zh.Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, Kingdom of Fra: 法國巴希-列內斯巴約訥
zh.lifeSummary: 當Milia Pérez de Lara於1120年出生在西班牙時，她的父親Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara38歲，母親Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba46歲。她和Gómez González de Manzanedo至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1186年12月6日享年66歲。

zh-hans.Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, Kingdom of Fra: 法国巴希-列內斯巴約訥
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Milia Pérez de Lara于1120年出生在西班牙时，她的父亲Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara38岁，母亲Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba46岁。她和Gómez González de Manzanedo至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1186年12月6日享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pérez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Miguel, Jorge, Ramon, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish (Pérez): patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . This surname is also found in France. Compare De Perez .

variants.name: Parez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Pérez (see Perez ).
In some cases possibly also French (Nord), Walloon, and Flemish: variant of Paré (see Pare ) or Paret .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Roberto, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Lara de los Infantes in Burgos province. Compare   De Lara  .

variants.name: De Lara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jose, Luis, Mauricio, Pedro, Alfonso, Ana, Jaime, Javier, Jorge, Merlinda.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition de ‘from’, of Lara .

nameMeanings.name: Milia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Shortened form of   Camilla  , also sometimes used as an independent given name.

variants.name: Camilla
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman family name Camillus, of obscure and presumably non-Roman origin. According to tradition, recorded by the Roman poet Virgil , Camilla was the name of a warrior maiden, Queen of the Volscians, who fought in the army of Aeneas (Aeneid 7:803–17).

en.lifeSummary: When Milia Pérez de Lara was born in 1120, in Spain, her father, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, was 38 and her mother, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, was 46. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Gómez González de Manzanedo. She died on 6 December 1186, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Milia Pérez de Lara est née en 1120, à Espagne, son père, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, avait 46 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Gómez González de Manzanedo. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1186, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Milia Pérez de Lara 1120 in Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara 38 und ihre Mutter Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba 46. Sie hatte mit Gómez González de Manzanedo mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1186 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Milia Pérez de Lara è nata il nel 1120 nel Spagna, sua padre, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, aveva 46 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Gómez González de Manzanedo. Morì il 6 dicembre 1186, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, Kingdom of Fra: フランスバセス-プイルeンeスバイオン
ja.lifeSummary: Milia Pérez de Laraが1120年にスペインで生まれた時，父Pedro Gonçalvez de Laraは38歳，母Condesa Ava Pérez de Trabaは46歳であった。彼女はGómez González de Manzanedoとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1186年12月6日に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Milia Pérez de Lara(이)가 1120년 스페인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 Gómez González de Manzanedo(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 12월 6일 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Milia Pérez de Lara nasceu em 1120, em Espanha, seu pai, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, tinha 46 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Gómez González de Manzanedo. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1186, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Milia Pérez de Lara родилась в 1120 г. в местности Испания, её отцу по имени Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, 46. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Gómez González de Manzanedo. Она умерла 6 декабря 1186 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Milia Pérez de Lara nació en 1120, en España, su papá, Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Condesa Ava Pérez de Traba, tenía 46 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Gómez González de Manzanedo. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1186, a la edad de 66 años.
